from an unused root meaning apparently to be sticky (rather perb. a demonstrative); from H2894 (טוּא), through the idea of dirt to be swept away);

43.gl: to pour out (literally or figuratively), i.e. empty
43.kj: [idiom] arm, cast out, draw (out), (make) empty, pour forth (out).

43.gl: dust (as powdered or gray); hence, clay, earth, mud
43.kj: ashes, dust, earth, ground, morter, powder, rubbish.

44.gl: to know (properly, to ascertain by seeing); used in a great variety of senses, figuratively, literally, euphemistically and inferentially (including observation, care, recognition; and causatively, instruction, designati
44.kj: acknowledge, acquaintance(-ted with), advise, answer, appoint, assuredly, be aware, (un-) awares, can(-not), certainly, comprehend, consider, [idiom] could they, cunning, declare,

44.gl: to put (used in a great variety of applications, literal, figurative, inferentially, and elliptically)
44.kj: [idiom] any wise, appoint, bring, call (a name), care, cast in, change, charge, commit, consider, convey, determine, [phrase] disguise, dispose, do, get, give, heap up, hold, imput

44.gl: to work (in any sense); by implication, to serve, till, (causatively) enslave, etc.
44.kj: [idiom] be, keep in bondage, be bondmen, bond-service, compel, do, dress, ear, execute, [phrase] husbandman, keep, labour(-ing man, bring to pass, (cause to, make to) serve(-ing, s

44.gl: the head (as most easily shaken), whether literal or figurative (in many applications, of place, time, rank, itc.)
44.kj: band, beginning, captain, chapiter, chief(-est place, man, things), company, end, [idiom] every (man), excellent, first, forefront, (be-)head, height, (on) high(-est part, (priest)
44.dv: from an unused root apparently meaning to shake;

44.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
44.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

44.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock

45.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
45.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

45.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
45.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma

45.gl: to be untrue, in word (to lie, feign, disown) or deed (to disappoint, fail, cringe)
45.kj: deceive, deny, dissemble, fail, deal falsely, be found liars, (be-) lie, lying, submit selves.

45.gl: broadness. i.e. (concrete) the ear (from its form in man)
45.kj: [phrase] advertise, audience, [phrase] displease, ear, hearing, [phrase] show.

45.gl: something heard, i.e. a sound, rumor, announcement; abstractly, audience
45.kj: bruit, fame, hear(-ing), loud, report, speech, tidings.

45.gl: foreign, or (concretely) a foreigner, or (abstractly) heathendom

46.gl: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
46.kj: [phrase] afflicted, age, (Ahoh-) (Ammon-) (Hachmon-) (Lev-) ite, (anoint-) ed one, appointed to, ([phrase]) arrow, (Assyr-) (Babylon-) (Egypt-) (Grec-) ian, one born, bough, branch

46.gl: to wilt; generally, to fall away, fail, faint; figuratively, to be foolish or (morally) wicked; causatively, to despise, disgrace
46.kj: disgrace, dishounour, lightly esteem, fade (away, -ing), fall (down, -ling, off), do foolishly, come to nought, [idiom] surely, make vile, wither.

46.gl: something enclosing, i.e. a margin (of a region, of a panel); concretely, a stronghold
foreign, or (concretely) a foreigner, or (abstractly) heathendom
properly, to leap suddenly, i.e. (by implication) to be dismayed

47.gl: alive; hence, raw (flesh); fresh (plant, water, year), strong; also (as noun, especially in the feminine singular and masculine plural) life (or living thing), whether literally or figuratively
47.kj: [phrase] age, alive, appetite, (wild) beast, company, congregation, life(-time), live(-ly), living (creature, thing), maintenance, [phrase] merry, multitude, [phrase] (be) old, qui

47.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
47.kj: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) lou

47.gl: to kneel; by implication to bless God (as an act of adoration), and (vice-versa) man (as a benefit); also (by euphemism) to curse (God or the king, as treason)
47.kj: [idiom] abundantly, [idiom] altogether, [idiom] at all, blaspheme, bless, congratulate, curse, [idiom] greatly, [idiom] indeed, kneel (down), praise, salute, [idiom] still, thank.

47.gl: properly, a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed); generally, a rock or boulder; figuratively, a refuge; also an edge (as precipitous)
47.kj: edge, [idiom] (mighty) God (one), rock, [idiom] sharp, stone, [idiom] strength, [idiom] strong. See also H1049 (בֵּית צוּר).

47.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
47.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

47.dv: rarely (shortened) אֱלֹהַּ; probably prolonged (emphatic) from H410 (אֵל);

48.gl: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
48.kj: add, apply, appoint, ascribe, assign, [idiom] avenge, [idiom] be (healed), bestow, bring (forth, hither), cast, cause, charge, come, commit, consider, count, [phrase] cry, deliver

48.gl: perhaps properly, to arrange; but used figuratively (of words), to speak; rarely (in a destructive sense) to subdue
48.kj: answer, appoint, bid, command, commune, declare, destroy, give, name, promise, pronounce, rehearse, say, speak, be spokesman, subdue, talk, teach, tell, think, use (entreaties), ut

48.gl: the bottom (as depressed); only adverbially, below (often with prepositional prefix underneath), in lieu of, etc.
48.kj: as, beneath, [idiom] flat, in(-stead), (same) place (where...is), room, for...sake, stead of, under, [idiom] unto, [idiom] when...was mine, whereas, (where-) fore, with.

48.gl: strength; as adjective, mighty; especially the Almighty (but used also of any deity)
48.kj: God (god), [idiom] goodly, [idiom] great, idol, might(-y one), power, strong. Compare names in '-el.'

48.gl: a people (as a congregated unit); specifically, a tribe (as those of Israel); hence (collectively) troops or attendants; figuratively, a flock
avengement, whether the act of the passion

49.gl: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
49.kj: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), hus
49.dv: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);

49.gl: to rise (in various applications, literal, figurative, intensive and causative)
49.kj: abide, accomplish, [idiom] be clearer, confirm, continue, decree, [idiom] be dim, endure, [idiom] enemy, enjoin, get up, make good, help, hold, (help to) lift up (again), make, [id

49.gl: to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
49.kj: bring up, exalt (self), extol, give, go up, haughty, heave (up), (be, lift up on, make on, set up on, too) high(-er, one), hold up, levy, lift(-er) up, (be) lofty, ([idiom] a-) lou

49.gl: meaning accession (used as an adverb or conjunction); also or yea; adversatively though
49.kj: also, [phrase] although, and (furthermore, yet), but, even, [phrase] how much less (more, rather than), moreover, with, yea.

49.gl: to snatch away, whether in a good or a bad sense
49.kj: [idiom] at all, defend, deliver (self), escape, [idiom] without fail, part, pluck, preserve, recover, rescue, rid, save, spoil, strip, [idiom] surely, take (out).

49.gl: violence; by implication, wrong; by meton. unjust gain
49.kj: cruel(-ty), damage, false, injustice, [idiom] oppressor, unrighteous, violence (against, done), violent (dealing), wrong.

50.gl: physically, to throw (a stone, an arrow) at or away; especially to revere or worship (with extended hands); intensively, to bemoan (by wringing the hands)
50.dv: a primitive root; used only as denominative from H3027 (יָד); literally, to use (i.e. hold out) the hand;

50.gl: play upon it; to make music, accompanied by the voice; hence to celebrate in song and music
50.kj: give praise, sing forth praises, psalms.
50.dv: a primitive root (perhaps identical with H2168 (זָמַר) through the idea of striking with the fingers); properly, to touch the strings or parts of a mu

50.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
50.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

50.gl: a foreign nation; hence, a Gentile; also (figuratively) a troop of animals, or a flight of locusts
50.dv: rarely (shortened) גֹּי; apparently from the same root as H1465 (גֵּוָה) (in the sense of massing);

50.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
50.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).
